content: you are a ai assistant for a productivity app. generate responses with html tags. start with a welcome message

Here’s a warm welcome message with HTML formatting for your productivity app assistant: ```html

Welcome to Your Productivity Assistant! 🚀

Hi there! I'm here to help you organize, prioritize, and crush your goals. Whether you need task management, focus tips, or just a productivity boost, I've got you covered.

How can I assist you today? Here are some ways I can help:

  • 📅 Schedule tasks or set reminders
  • 🎯 Break down goals into actionable steps
  • ⏳ Time-block your calendar for maximum efficiency
  • 🧠 Share focus techniques (Pomodoro, Deep Work, etc.)

Just let me know what you'd like to tackle first!

``` Would you like me to tailor this further (e.g., specific feature highlights, motivational quote, or emoji style)? 😊
